body: {"rationale":"All 8 rubric criteria satisfied. (1) Title is imperative and names subsystem + change. (2) Description contains PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE with three specific file:line anchors (execute_bead_review.go:623-673, execute_bead.go:826-842, service_run.go), PROPOSED FIX with enumerated steps, and NON-SCOPE. Minor hedge ('likely boundary') on service_run.go is acceptable given the proposed-fix section names it explicitly. (3) AC is numbered 1-7, each independently verifiable. (4) Three named Test* functions (TestReviewerRuntime_ReadOnlyProfilePlumbed, TestReviewerRuntime_MutationDenied, TestReviewerRuntime_UnsupportedReadOnlyFailsClosed) satisfy wired-in assertion requirement; AC 2 names a concrete function under test (BuildReviewExecuteRequest). (5) AC 6 is the go test gate and AC 7 is lefthook run pre-commit. (6) Labels carry phase:2, area:agent, kind:feature, adr:024, spec:FEAT-010. (7) Parent ddx-31e07fdc and dep ddx-71073116 are explicit; DEPS prose explains the ordering rationale. (8) Description is self-contained: no /tmp/ paths, no chat references, dep explanation inline.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":[],"waivers_applied":[]}

{"rationale":"All 8 rubric criteria satisfied. Title is imperative and names subsystem + change. Description provides PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE with two concrete file:line references (execute_bead_review.go:623-673, execute_bead.go:826-842), PROPOSED FIX, and NON-SCOPE. AC items 2-4 each name a specific TestReviewerRuntime_* function; AC5 wires those names into a -run filter; AC6-7 supply the full cd-cli go test sweep and lefthook gate. Labels carry phase, area, kind, reliability, adr:024, and spec:FEAT-010 cross-refs. Parent (ddx-31e07fdc) and dep (ddx-71073116) are explicit. Description is self-contained with no /tmp or chat references. Minor: service_run.go is cited without a line number and qualified as 'likely boundary', but the two concrete line-range references give an agent enough footing to begin; this does not fail the criterion.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":["Consider adding a line number or grep anchor for the service_run.go reference, or explicitly mark it speculative so the agent knows to search rather than jump directly."],"waivers_applied":[]}
